message:
sync: Update .beads/issues.jsonl with latest issue state

Synchronizes the local beads issue tracker state with ongoing
development activity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-1jt.4.3","title":"Add minisign verification to install.sh (optional but recommended)","description":"# Add Minisign Verification to install.sh (Optional but Recommended)

## Purpose
Verify downloaded binaries with minisign signatures to prevent tampering.

## Behavior
- If minisign available: verify by default
- If missing: warn, optionally install, or fail when --require-signatures
- Embed public key in installer (from dsr config)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] install.sh verifies .minisig when available
- [ ] Clear failure if signature invalid
- [ ] Non-interactive mode supports --require-signatures","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:37:11.776660104Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T15:58:24.702985217Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:39:57.206972391Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.3.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:39:57.459042194Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:37:11.776660104Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:39:57.697458578Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-1jt.4.4","title":"Add installer cache/offline mode + gh release download fallback","description":"# Add Installer Cache/Offline Mode + gh release download Fallback

## Purpose
Improve reliability when network is flaky by caching release assets and allowing offline installs.

## Behavior
- Cache downloads in ~/.cache/dsr/installers/<tool>/<version>
- Support --cache-dir and --offline flags
- Prefer gh release download when gh is available (auth + retries)
- Fallback to curl when gh is missing

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Cached assets reused when available
- [ ] Offline mode fails fast with clear error if cache missing
- [ ] gh release download works for private repos","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:37:19.727170447Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T15:58:35.225335336Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.4.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.1.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:39:02.979791158Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.4.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:37:19.727170447Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.4.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:40:04.030679358Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-1jt.4.5","title":"Provide PowerShell installer wrapper for native Windows","description":"# Provide PowerShell Installer Wrapper for Native Windows

## Purpose
Offer a first-class Windows install path (install.ps1) that mirrors install.sh behavior for users not using WSL.

## Behavior
- Detect OS/arch, download matching .exe
- Verify SHA256 (and minisign if available)
- Install to user-writable PATH (e.g., %LOCALAPPDATA%\Programs\dsr\bin)
- Support `-Yes`, `-Verbose`, `-Version`, `-Prefix`, `-CacheDir`, `-Offline`
- Respect non-interactive mode (`$env:CI=1` or `-Yes`)

## Logging
- Human-readable logs to stderr
- Optional JSON output for automation

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] install.ps1 parity with install.sh (flags, logs)
- [ ] Works on Windows 10/11 without admin
- [ ] Signature verification supported when minisign present
- [ ] Documented usage in README","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:37:25.838673495Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T17:52:27.874310491Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.4.5","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.1.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:39:03.227926195Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.4.5","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:37:25.838673495Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.4.5","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:40:08.359019185Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.4.5","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.4.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:40:08.618811604Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.4.5","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.4.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:40:08.857268243Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-1jt.5","title":"Theme 5: Testing & Validation","description":"# Testing & Validation

## Purpose
Ensure all components of the fallback release system work correctly through comprehensive unit, integration, and E2E tests with detailed logging.

## Testing Strategy

### 1. Unit Tests
- Platform detection
- Release freshness calculation
- Checksum/signature verification
- Toolchain detection and guardrails

### 2. Integration Tests
- Check → Build → Release pipeline (mocked GH/SSH)
- Repos registry management
- Status/report + prune dry-run

### 3. Contract Tests
- JSON schema validation for **every** `--json` output
- Stream separation: stderr empty on success

### 4. E2E Tests
- Docker containers for Linux installers
- Act-based fallback pipeline (mocked release)
- Package manager update workflow (Homebrew/Scoop) in dry-run

## Test Framework
Use bats-core for Bash tests.

## Logging Requirements
All tests must capture and print logs on failure (shared harness).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Unit + integration tests run <5 minutes
- [ ] E2E tests run <30 minutes
- [ ] JSON schema + stream separation validated
- [ ] Detailed logs available for failures","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:10:44.485219623Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T17:39:04.926136706Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.5","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:10:44.485219623Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-1jt.5.1","title":"Write unit tests for platform detection and freshness checking","description":"# Unit Tests: Platform Detection & Freshness Checking

## Test File
tests/unit/test_core_functions.bats

## Platform Detection Tests

### Test Cases
\`\`\`bash
@test "detect Linux x86_64" {
  mock_uname "Linux" "x86_64"
  run detect_platform
  assert_equal "\$PLATFORM" "linux-amd64"
}

@test "detect Linux ARM64" {
  mock_uname "Linux" "aarch64"
  run detect_platform
  assert_equal "\$PLATFORM" "linux-arm64"
}

@test "detect macOS ARM64 (Apple Silicon)" {
  mock_uname "Darwin" "arm64"
  run detect_platform
  assert_equal "\$PLATFORM" "darwin-arm64"
}

@test "detect macOS x86_64 (Intel)" {
  mock_uname "Darwin" "x86_64"
  run detect_platform
  assert_equal "\$PLATFORM" "darwin-amd64"
}

@test "detect Windows via MINGW" {
  mock_uname "MINGW64_NT-10.0" "x86_64"
  run detect_platform
  assert_equal "\$PLATFORM" "windows-amd64"
}

@test "unsupported OS fails gracefully" {
  mock_uname "FreeBSD" "amd64"
  run detect_platform
  assert_failure
  assert_output --partial "Unsupported OS"
}

@test "unsupported arch fails gracefully" {
  mock_uname "Linux" "riscv64"
  run detect_platform
  assert_failure
  assert_output --partial "Unsupported architecture"
}
\`\`\`

## Freshness Check Tests

### Test Cases
\`\`\`bash
@test "release 0 commits behind is fresh" {
  mock_gh_compare 0
  run check_freshness "v1.0.0"
  assert_success
}

@test "release 10 commits behind is fresh (boundary)" {
  mock_gh_compare 10
  run check_freshness "v1.0.0"
  assert_success
}

@test "release 11 commits behind is stale (boundary)" {
  mock_gh_compare 11
  run check_freshness "v1.0.0"
  assert_failure
  assert_output --partial "commits behind"
}

@test "release 100 commits behind is very stale" {
  mock_gh_compare 100
  run check_freshness "v1.0.0"
  assert_failure
  assert_output --partial "100 commits behind"
}

@test "freshness check handles API error" {
  mock_gh_error "rate limit exceeded"
  run check_freshness "v1.0.0"
  # Should warn but not fail hard
  assert_success
  assert_output --partial "Could not check freshness"
}

@test "freshness check without gh CLI uses curl fallback" {
  unset_command "gh"
  mock_curl_compare 5
  run check_freshness "v1.0.0"
  assert_success
}
\`\`\`

## Mock Helpers
\`\`\`bash
# tests/helpers/mocks.bash

mock_uname() {
  local os="\$1" arch="\$2"
  function uname() {
    case "\$1" in
      -s) echo "\$os" ;;
      -m) echo "\$arch" ;;
    esac
  }
  export -f uname
}

mock_gh_compare() {
  local ahead_by="\$1"
  function gh() {
    if [[ "\$*" == *"compare"* ]]; then
      echo "{\"ahead_by\": \$ahead_by}"
    fi
  }
  export -f gh
}

mock_gh_error() {
  local error="\$1"
  function gh() {
    echo "gh: \$error" >&2
    return 1
  }
  export -f gh
}
\`\`\`

## Logging Output
Each test logs:
- Input parameters
- Mock configuration
- Function output
- Assertions checked

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All platform combinations tested
- [ ] Boundary conditions for freshness tested
- [ ] Error cases handled
- [ ] Mock helpers reusable
- [ ] Tests run in <10 seconds","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:11:32.707115669Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T16:53:11.550424425Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:15:53.451303881Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:11:32.707115669Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.5.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T16:53:11.550295352Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-1jt.5.10","title":"Write tests for config loader + doctor + GitHub API adapter","description":"# Tests for Config Loader + Doctor + GitHub API Adapter

## Coverage
- Config precedence (flags > env > file > defaults)
- Schema validation failures
- Doctor detection for missing deps
- API adapter caching (ETag) + rate-limit handling
- **Runtime guardrails**: absolute path normalization + safe delete helpers
- **Bash version gating** behavior (non-interactive error paths)
- **Logging layout**: date-based log dirs + `logs/latest` symlink

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Unit tests for config resolution
- [ ] Integration tests for doctor outputs
- [ ] Mocked API adapter tests with cache hits/misses
- [ ] Guardrail helpers reject relative paths
- [ ] Safe delete refuses non-dsr paths
- [ ] Logging layout matches XDG spec","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:37:37.282238775Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T18:11:01.733936377Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.5.10","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.1.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:40:27.472206911Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.5.10","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.1.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:40:28.002220529Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.5.10","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:37:37.282238775Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.5.10","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.5.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:40:13.484175153Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.5.10","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.7.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:40:28.273524616Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.5.10","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.7.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:40:27.754759591Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.5.10","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.7.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T17:37:04.784759049Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-1jt.5.19","title":"Tests for Homebrew/Scoop update workflow","description":"# Tests for Homebrew/Scoop Update Workflow

 {"id":"bd-1jt.5.2","title":"Write E2E tests for installer scripts using Docker","description":"# E2E Tests for Installer Scripts

## Purpose
Validate that generated install.sh scripts work correctly in real environments using Docker containers.

## Test File
`tests/e2e/test_installers.bats`

## Test Environments
- ubuntu:22.04 (Linux x64)
- debian:bookworm (alt Linux)
- arm64v8/ubuntu:22.04 (Linux ARM64, QEMU)

## Test Cases
- Basic install (binary download)
- Source build path (`--source`)
- Stale release detection
- Checksum verification
- Minisign verification (when available)
- Cache/offline mode (if enabled)
- Custom install prefix

## Logging
Each E2E test captures:
- Full Docker output
- Installer verbose logs
- Timing info

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests pass on Ubuntu x64
- [ ] Source build tests work
- [ ] Signature + checksum verification tested
- [ ] Cache/offline mode tested
- [ ] Tests complete in 30 minutes or less","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:13:18.607161544Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T17:39:13.579476440Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:15:54.630086373Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.4.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T17:36:21.645272566Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.4.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T17:36:24.870633398Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:13:18.607161544Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.5.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T16:53:13.020648655Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-1jt.5.20","title":"Tests for secrets/credential resolution + redaction","description":"# Tests for Secrets/Credential Resolution + Redaction

Ensure credential precedence is correct and sensitive values are never leaked to logs or JSON output.

## Purpose
Ensure `repos.d/` registry is complete, valid, and safe to use for builds/releases/installers.

## Coverage
- Required fields per tool (repo, local_path, build_cmd, targets, workflow)
- `repos validate` reports missing fields
- Default `repos.d/` contains all 16 tools
- Discovery is read-only unless `--apply`
- Path normalization (absolute paths only)
- No duplicate tool names across files

- [ ] Integration tests for `dsr repos validate/list/info`
- [ ] Default `repos.d` completeness verified

+{"id":"bd-1jt.5.21","title":"Tests for repos registry completeness + validation","description":"# Tests for Repos Registry Completeness + Validation

## Purpose
Ensure `repos.d/` registry is complete, valid, and safe to use for builds/releases/installers.

## Coverage
- Required fields per tool (repo, local_path, build_cmd, targets, workflow)
- `repos validate` reports missing fields
- Default `repos.d/` contains all 16 tools
- Discovery is read-only unless `--apply`
- Path normalization (absolute paths only)
- No duplicate tool names across files

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Unit tests for validation rules
- [ ] Integration tests for `dsr repos validate/list/info`
- [ ] Default `repos.d` completeness verified

 {"id":"bd-1jt.5.22","title":"Tests for throttling logic + watch debounce/dedupe","description":"# Tests for Throttling Logic + Watch Debounce/Dedupe

## Purpose
Verify queue-time detection and watch-mode behavior (debounce, jitter, dedupe) are correct and deterministic.

## Coverage
- queued > threshold triggers throttled
- in_progress with missing/old run_started_at treated as throttled
- debounce prevents flapping (requires N consecutive samples)
- dedupe prevents repeated triggers for same run_id
- backoff on API errors

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Unit tests cover queue-time calculations (time freeze)
- [ ] Watch mode dedupe + debounce tested with mocked runs
- [ ] Backoff paths covered
- [ ] Logs captured on failure","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T17:51:10.903933207Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T17:51:25.063537507Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.5.22","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T17:51:15.240943237Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.5.22","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T17:51:19.225542330Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.5.22","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T17:51:10.903933207Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1jt.5.22","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.5.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T17:51:25.063497371Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-1jt.5.3","title":"Write integration tests for dsr commands","description":"# Integration Tests for dsr Commands

## Purpose
Test that dsr commands work correctly with real (mocked) GH API responses and tool interactions, while preserving stream separation and JSON validity.

## Test File
`tests/integration/test_commands.bats`

## Test Cases (minimum)

### dsr check
```bash
@test "dsr check detects queued run over threshold" {
  export GH_MOCK_RESPONSE='[{"status":"queued","createdAt":"2026-01-30T12:00:00Z"}]'
  run dsr check ntm
  assert_failure
  assert_output --partial "THROTTLED"
}
```

### dsr watch
```bash
@test "dsr watch --once returns valid JSON" {
  run dsr watch --once --json
  echo "$output" | jq .
}
```

### dsr repos
```bash
@test "dsr repos list shows all 16 tools" {
  run dsr repos list
  assert_success
  assert_output --partial "ntm"
}
```

### dsr build (dry-run)
```bash
@test "dsr build --dry-run shows planned actions" {
  run dsr build ntm --dry-run
  assert_success
  assert_output --partial "Would build"
}
```

### dsr release (dry-run)
```bash
@test "dsr release --dry-run shows upload plan" {
  mkdir -p /tmp/test-artifacts
  touch /tmp/test-artifacts/ntm-linux-amd64
  run dsr release ntm v1.0.0 --artifacts /tmp/test-artifacts --dry-run
  assert_success
  assert_output --partial "Would upload"
}
```

### dsr status/report
```bash
@test "dsr status --json outputs schema" {
  run dsr status --json
  echo "$output" | jq .
}
```

## Mock Setup
- `tests/helpers/mock_gh.bash` for API responses
- `tests/helpers/mock_ssh.bash` for remote builds

## Logging Requirements
- All tests must use shared harness (log capture on failure)
- Ensure stdout-only JSON when `--json` (stderr empty unless error)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All dsr commands have integration coverage
- [ ] Mocking infrastructure works
- [ ] Tests run in under 2 minutes
- [ ] Edge cases covered (errors, timeouts)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:15:05.278042146Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T20:15:31.974636721Z","closed_at":"2026-01-30T20:15:31.974493411Z","close_reason":"Implemented integration tests for dsr commands in tests/integration/test_commands.bats. 40 test cases covering: dsr check (with mocked GH API), dsr repos list/info, dsr config show/init/validate, dsr status, dsr doctor, dsr build/release (dry-run), JSON output validation, stream separation tests, exit code consistency, and mock infrastructure
